_meta.title: Import Users via Screenshot OCR
_meta.description: Navigate to People → Import → upload a screenshot, let YeshID OCR extract users

params.screenshot_path: Absolute local path to the screenshot image file

chain.code: const inp = document.querySelector('input[type=file][accept*=image]') || document.querySelector('input[type=file]'); const dt = new DataTransfer(); dt.items.add(new File([''], '{{screenshot_path}}')); inp.files = dt.files; inp.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', {bubbles:true}));
chain.description: Attach screenshot to the image file input
Read the list of users YeshID extracted from the screenshot — verify before confirming
Read success confirmation or error — independent outcome verification
